text: From Provider: Hi there, 1) He definitely needs/ an appt to review the PET scan with Dr. Person1, Im sorry that wasn't set up earlier, we can set something up for MM/DD/YYYY. In person or telemed? 2) Also , Dr. Person1 would be happy to see you to r/o hemachromatosis, let me know/IS if you need help getting an appt Person2

From Patient: Hello Person1! I just set up an appt for me to see Dr. Person2 on Mon. MM/DD/YYYY, 4:30pm. Can Person3 and I make that a combo appt? Or, for Person3, if it's to discuss the test results he / we (Person3 doesn't listen to test results - I do) can do a telephone appt with Dr. Person4 So I am correct to hold off appt with dr. Person5 until PET results are in, yes? THANK YOU for your help! Person6 (for Person3)
From Provider: Hi, We need to make an office visit for Person1 to review PET scan with Dr. Person2, please let us know what works. Thank you Person3
From Provider: Hi, Sure, this was faxed MM/DD/YYYY. Take care Person1

From Patient: Dr. Person1 has sent an order for a new PET scan (attached). He says it is a-okay for Person2 to have it done at G Hosp, considering how difficult it is for Person2 to travel. Please advise me how to submit this to G Hosp, or if you can assist me in doing that. many thanks. Person3 (Person2's wife)
From Provider: This should ok, please call XXX-XXX-XXXX and let them know that you have a prescription for a PET scan and that you want him to have it a LOCATION. Person1
From Provider: Hi Person1, I will look into/start working on this. I will let you know once I have more information. Kind regards, Person2, RN

From Patient: Person1 has done well managing pain while eliminating Oxycontin ER 10mg (as Dr. Person2 was keen Person1 do ASAP). Person1 has been taking Oxycodone HCL 15mg, usually split to 7.5mg, about every MM/DD/YYYY through the day, with MM/DD/YYYY off while sleeping. He needs another 7.5mg every so often, usually MM/DD/YYYY. Person1 needs a refill of Oxycodone HCL by MM/DD/YYYY, Wed. MM/DD/YYYY. Person1 also needs a new Rx for Meloxicam 15mg, if Dr. Person3 wants him to continue taking it. Last, we had a LOCATION appt with Dr. Person4 MM/DD/YYYY. Dr. Person4 asked me to give Dr. Person3 his mobile tel. no. as they have missed each other in MM/DD/YYYY. Dr. Person4: XXX-XXX-XXXX (mob.), XXX-XXX-XXXX (off.) We met with Dr. Person5 MM/DD/YYYY; she will also be in touch with Dr. Person4. Thank you, One and All, Person6

From Patient: Hello Person1, thank you and All for your help! Person2 is having a tough day with pain MM/DD/YYYY; he's not in shape to get to the office. I am on the lookout for the permission / patient approval document that is being sent by the blood testing lab. I'll let you know as soon as that is completed. I would like to add one more Rx request: a new script for Lidocaine / Prilocaine cream, please. We are both at the limit of getting "stuck." Most appreciative! One more bit of info for Dr. Person3: Dr. Person4 was speaking with Dr. Person5 (MSKCC) to see if there might be a clinical trial suitable for Person2. Her thinking is that might be a (better?) alternative to radiation, which would be administered only at a palliative level given Person2's previous radiation treatment history. She also told us she expected any chemotherapy Dr. Person3 might determine would be subsequent to radiation (if that is the route we g o). Thanks again, Person6

From Provider: Hi, I think I just heard them scheduling Person1 out front for MM/DD/YYYY. I will look into the oxycodone 15mg IR, he got 30 tablets on MM/DD/YYYY how many a day is he taking (I just want to be sure we are ordering enough for MM/DD/YYYY) Also, how is he taking the Eliquis: 5mg a day or twice a day, thanx par Person2

From Patient: Hello Person1. Yep, just got a call for MM/DD/YYYY w Dr. B on MM/DD/YYYY. Re Oxy 15mg rapid release: per Dr. Person2's desire and Dr. B agree to get Person3 off Oxy ext release ASAP, and work down to lowest usage Oxy rapid w/o dealing w break through pain, which can be pretty nasty. I've set up Person3's other am, MM/DD/YYYY, pm meds w 7.5mg Oxy 3x diem, with 7.5 Oxy boosters once, twice a day as needed. Trying to keep Oxy steady at MM/DD/YYYY, but MM/DD/YYYY had to go MM/DD/YYYY. 30 count has gotten him through MM/DD/YYYY, considering ste p down and a few tough pain MM/DD/YYYY thereafter. Re Eliquis: MM/DD/YYYY two 5mg tabs morning and night; MM/DD/YYYY one 5mg am and one 5mg pm. Sig swelling (but improving slightly) swelling of right leg persists. Person3 is tolerating all meds well and following directions. Appetite, a bit of a struggle, as expected; digestion normal (that may become diarrhea as radiation has started MM/DD/YYYY). Dr. B recommends Metamucil 1 tsp 2x diem. Other symptoms: quite tired, napping, MM/DD/YYYY recently interrupted by anxiety attacks. Thanks a ton, Person1, best – Person4
From Provider: Thank you for the clarification, I sent the new Rx off to Dr. Person1, I hope he signs it MM/DD/YYYY but it may not be until MM/DD/YYYY Person2

From Patient: Hello, I was just looking at my calendar and realized my next appt with Dr Person1 is MM/DD/YYYY. That is MM/DD/YYYY I'm supposed to start my next round of Ibrance?? I will be finishing my week off on MM/DD/YYYY ( MM/DD/YYYY my labs are scheduled). The pharmacy won't have time to get my meds delivered to me if we keep this schedule? Please advise. Thank you very much

From Provider: Hello, Orders have been entered into the Epic system for lab work. You can have this drawn at any any of the L&M draw stations MM/DD/YYYY before your visit with Dr Person1. The pharmacy is pretty quick to get meds out to patients and can do same day delivery if needed. Jessica RN OCN
From Patient: Hi, when I went to get blood work after I saw you they were going to do all of the blood test you had put in. I told them just the CBC But they did it without differential?
From Patient: Hi I had my MM/DD/YYYY bloodwork done MM/DD/YYYY, just checking to see if it is ok to continue this round of Ibrance? Started week three MM/DD/YYYY. Thank you, Person1

From Patient: Thank you Person1. I will get the flu shot when I come in next time if that's OK. Dr Person2 was checking on the whooping cough for me to see if it was OK to have it with my WBC and being on I Person3 and my other meds. If so I can ask my Primary if I can get it when I see her on the 26th.

From Provider: Hi Person1, Ok for you to get the vaccine for whooping cough (tdap) but you will have to do that at your PCP or local pharmacy. It should be safe, hospital is taking every precaution to keep the environment safe, I know it causes concern. Use covid precautions, mask , wash your hands, social distance. Have a great weekend. Person2
From Patient: Thank you!

From Provider: Ms. Person1, I had ordered both tumor markers, adding the CEA (just another marker in this situation) to the CA27.29 and agree that the CA27.29 has been a very good marker for you. I was happy to see that this was trending down. We do not have a comparison for the CEA, but if this serves us value in the future, we will then have something to look back and compare to. Take care, RDL ----- Message ----- From: Sent: To: Subject: RE: Visit Follow-Up Question Hi Dr Person2, At our last appointment we discussed getting the cancer antigen test at my next blood work. I thought we were doing the CA 27 Dash 29 that I have always had done but no results have come in for that. A test result for CEA came in but I don't know what that is. I have nothing to compare that to although it appears the numbers pretty high which is concerning. I was wondering if there was a reason for switching to a different test? The 27/29 has been a good indicator for me in the past. Thank you

From Patient: Thank you Dr Person1. I was glad to see that too. ----- Message ----- From: Sent: To: Subject: RE: Visit Follow-Up Question Ms. Person2, I had ordered both tumor markers, adding the CEA (just another marker in this situation) to the CA27.29 and agree that the CA27.29 has been a very good marker for you. I was happy to see that this was trending down. We do not have a comparison for the CEA, but if this serves us value in the future, we will then have something to look back and compare to. Take care, RDL ----- Message ----- From: Sent: To: Subject: RE: Visit Follow-Up Question Hi Dr Person1, At our last appointment we discussed getting the cancer antigen test at my next blood work. I thought we were doing the CA 27 Dash 29 that I have always had done but no results have come in for that. A test result for CEA came in but I don't know what that is. I have nothing to compare that to although it appears the numbers pretty high which is concerning. I was wondering if there was a reason for switching to a different test? The 27/29 has been a good indicator for me in the past. Thank you
From Provider: I believe it should be 9am so you have can labs drawn before seeing Dr. Person1. Thank you.

From Patient: Good morning! I saw the results of the CT abdomen pelvis test. It mentioned the CT chest results would be in another report. Will that be covered when Dr. Person1 calls me to discuss the test results? Can I expect to see them on my Person2 app Today?
From Patient: Good morning, My primary, Dr. Person1, has given me the green light to get a covid booster shot. Do I have the Ok from Dr. Person2?
From Patient: Hi Person1, Thanks for your reply. Much appreciated! Person2
From Patient: Please can you tell me about my results good or bad

From Provider: I have sent a message to Dr. Person1 to ask him to review them and let us know. The white count is lower and also the platelets so we will find out when he wants them repeated. Did you receive them in My Chart? ----- Message ----- From: Sent: To: Subject: RE: Test Results Question Please let me know about blood work How it's From MM/DD/YYYY and now
From Patient: How was my vital on the last blood draw Also How was my blood density or I need to go other place to do it

From Provider: Hi Mr Person1, The test is a Dexa Bone Density Test. This is not a blood test it is a test to see how strong your bones are. I will ask our Clinical Secretary to schedule this and she will call you with the date and time. This test usually takes MM/DD/YYYY to get an appointment which is fine it is not an urgent t est. Let me know if I can help you with anything else. Person2 LOCATION
From Patient: I want to change my sooner tha MM/DD/YYYY do to concerning the blood on my urine
From Provider: PSA in still coming down and this is good. Very glad stopping the beet juice helped your urine. Person1
From Patient: Person1, Thank you for this good news Happy Thanksgiving

From Patient: Doctor, Could you please send the pet scan report to Person1 , doctor Person2 assistant. Her email address is: address@email.com. The good doctor is swamped in a emails and she wants to make sure he sees it Best
From Provider: Hi Person1, I emailed this today. Person2, RN
From Provider: Hello Person1, I sent your message to Dr. Person2 to ask her. - Person3

From Provider: Hello Person1, I sent a message to the doctors that read the scan to question this. I compared the impression from the PET from MM/DD/YYYY to the one in MM/DD/YYYY and they are very different wording . I would assume that this is the correct reading for this result and they mean to write "compared to MM/DD/YYYY". I am double checking this for you though. I will let you know. - Person2

From Patient: He indicated he would prefer it be done at Org2 as it would coincide with yearly visit schedule, but it depends on pandemic obviously. I will check back with Person1 early MM/DD/YYYY and will let you know Best

From Patient: Good Morning my friends, Unfortunately I took a nasty slip down five steps MM/DD/YYYY. I am a little bruised. My left hip and tail bone are hurting. I did not skydive or do anything else that was very risky, just slipped down the stairs. Do you think I need X-rays? Person1XXX-XXX-XXXX
From Provider: Sorry to bother you folks. The ED doctor just called. I tested positive for the flu. She is worried about me taking the Ibrance and asked me to give you this message.
From Patient: Hi Person1 If you are feeling much better, we could restart Ibrance on MM/DD/YYYY? If not feeling well please hold and call us back G
From Provider: Hi Person3! Per Person1, as long as you are feeling ok you can go ahead and start Ibrance today! I hope this helps! Best, Person2

From Patient: Good Morning Last night I went to the Org2 ED. The consensus is I had asthma attacks. I told them of this pain on my right side. It is intermittent and sharp, located right under my right breast to my right side. They said it may be muscle spasms. I just wanted you to know. I also was prescribed steriods for the asthma. Can I take that with the Ibrance? Should I start Ibrance tonight? Lots of words for a MM/DD/YYYY morning, thank you for your time. Person1
From Provider: Hi, Do you usually get blood work before restarting? Thanks,

From Provider: Hi Person1 OK to take the steroids with Ibrance but I dont see any recent cbc to make sure the numbers are good to start Ibrance. Also we can hold off on starting the Ibrance a few days but if you can get a CBC that would be a good place to start G
From Patient: Hi again. I also have super bad heartburn. Person1

From Provider: Hi Not really I can have toast and it will bother me. I take Tums sometimes. This is happening for a few months off and on. But now it is worse. I vomit at times. I sleep raised up. Are there any suggestions as to what I can take?

From Provider: Hello Person1 - good news on the CT of the Chest. The lung nodules are totally unchanged - making it very likely that those left behind are benign just like the ones that were removed. Totally stable. All the best, Person2
From Patient: Ok
From Provider: Hi Person1, I'll check in with Dr. Person2 about getting it removed. Once we get the ok to remove it, we'll get you scheduled with IR for them to take it out. - Person3
From Patient: Ok

From Patient: Good evening I hope this email finds you well. Im preparing for surgery on MM/DD/YYYY & I following up about my Org2 paperwork. After speaking to Person1 on MM/DD/YYYY & MM/DD/YYYY , I was able to fax the paperwork that night from work. I haven heard anything or it seen that it was received. Please let me know if my paperwork was received & or completed. If you have received it you can email completed documents to: address@email.com or you can fax to XXX-XXX-XXXX attention to Person2 ASAP!!

From Provider: Hi Paperwork was completed last week, but awaiting Dr. Person1's signature. I have asked Person2 to send it as soon as it is signed. I put you off work from MM/DD/YYYY to MM/DD/YYYY. Best, Person3

From Provider: Hi Person1, I sent the message to Dr. Person2 yesterday evening and have not gotten a response yet. He has significantly decreased his clinic time with his promotion. Did the flexeril not help?

From Patient: Is he still going to be seeing patients in clinic? I did not realize he got a promotion. No, it has not helped. It is still in that one area on the left. It is interfering with my daily activities Person1

From Patient: Good morning, I just want to confirm with Dr. Person1 that I will just be keeping my CT Scan in 3 months, I am assuming based on my lab results which he was waiting for? Also, if he is satisfied/pleased with the recent result....his thoughts? Thanks, Person2
From Provider: Hi Person1, I will have Person3, APRN sign the orders and send the refill to your pharmacy! Let me know if there is anything else I can help you with! Thanks, Person2, RN

From Patient: Ok. And also I would like to request and be seen still by Dr. Person1 as I have developed a confidence in him with him being my Oncologist. If possible, I would also like to speak with him directly. Thank you, Person2

From Patient: I have had pain on the left side of my breast and right above in the chest area. I also have what feels like muscle pain in my shoulder blade area and my upper arm. I think it may be a pulled muscle? Is there anything I can get to help with that pain? I have tried ibuprofen and I tried Gabapentin this morning, but the pain is still there and is really affecting my days. I also feel a little tingling in my upper arm at times. Could you give me some suggestions or let me know if there is anything I can take to help this? It has been going on for about 4 days now. Thanks, Person1
From Patient: I was wondering if you could send a refill in for me for my Oxycodone to Org2 in Org2? If you could, please let me know when this is sent over to the pharmacy. Thank you, Person1
From Patient: Thank you

From Provider: It is Org1 orthopedics in Location and the physical therapist is Person1. I put a referral in for but didn't see the option of the location so it might not work. Call over to them and see what they need from me and we can try to make it happen. The cake was delicious, thoroughly enjoyed by all. Thanks so much again!
From Patient: Ok, thanks
From Provider: Hi Dr Person1, I sent your message on to DR Person2 and will let you know who she recommends
From Patient: Thank you.

From Patient: As I traveling immediately following my next visit (MM/DD/YYYY) to Org3, I plan to bring several Covid tests. Perhaps it might be prudent to also have a script for medication, ie Lagevrio- aka molnupiravir. Could you discuss this script with Person2 before my appointment Thanks.

From Patient: Correct me if I wrong- I thought serial CT scans q12 week intervals and repeat MRI q6 months. Both now seem to be scheduled prematurely. I remain asymptomatic, no pain. Your advice please.

From Patient: Hello Person1, Would you mind making a referral please to a suitable doctor at Org3 that can undertake the above procedure for me. I would prefer to keep these types of procedures within Org3 whenever possible. Many thanks, Person2
From Provider: Yes, referral is in. Someone should call you to schedule. Person1
From Provider: Hello Person1, Dr. Person3 can put a referral in for a PT eval with a lymphedema therapist. Have you checked with your cardiologist re your ankle swelling? Thank You Person4 Person2 RN

From Patient: Thanks. Yes I have and am seeing her again on MM/DD/YYYY. However I can directly relate the swelling to the new drug since it wasn as severe before the switch over. I generally feel better on the new drug just the ankle and foot swelling that is now the issue. Thanks, Person1
From Provider: Person1, The PT referral was placed Thanks Person2

From Patient: Hello Person1, Sharing a picture of my abdomen some 40 days after starting on the heparin. In addition to the bruising, I probably have 20+ hematoma under the skin. This is both uncomfortable and painful. Would like to switch back to Eliquis. Thanks, Person2
From Patient: Thank you!

From Provider: Hi Person1, The referral was placed to Org3 Digestive disease. Their number is XXX-XXX-XXXX. I would give them a week to review your case and then call you for an appt. If you do not hear from them by the end of next week. Give them a call. Thanks Person2 RN
From Patient: Thank you Person1.

From Provider: Hi Person1, Patients on PI3 kinase inhibitors like Person2 can get a type of pneumonia called PCP pneumonia. Bactrim is an antibiotic given to prevent this. It is taken as one tablet on MM/DD/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, and MM/DD/YYYY. Please pick it up and start it. Let me know if you have any issues with it like rashes or diarrhea . Most people tolerate it fine 3 times per week. I realized you were not on it when I finalized my last note, and I thought I messaged you, but it sounds like I didn't. I apologize for the confusion. Person3
From Provider: Person1, The PT referral was placed Thanks Person2

From Provider: Hello Mr. Person1, I spoke to Dr. Person2 today and our clinic secretaries will be calling you to confirm a 4:40 pm appt with Dr. Person2 this MM/DD/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, via Person3 video. Sincerely, Person4, RN
From Patient: Hello, I need a refill for the above. Sent a request previously but nothing has come through. Have one tablet to take today but nothing after that. Please expedite. Thanks, Person1
From Patient: Thank you. CVS at Org1, Org1?
From Provider: Yes Person1
From Provider: I sent the email last night, so you should hear back about scheduling by the end of the week. If not, please let me know. Thank you!

From Patient: Hello Person1, I had the EBUS procedure yesterday and I now scheduled to begin radiation therapy on MM/DD/YYYY for five sessions. Should we bring forward the PET scans planned for MM/DD/YYYY or defer them until after the treatment has ended? I trying to plan a visit to LOCATION for a month or two as soon after the treatment has ended but not sure what we going to be doing about scans now. Thank you, Person2

From Provider: Person1 I discussed with Dr Person2 - he would like you to defer scans until after radiation is complete. Please call #XXX-XXX-XXXX to reschedule. Please then call our office or mychart once scans rescheduled and we will reschedule appointment with Dr Person2. Thanks! Person3
From Patient: OK thanks, I will reschedule them. OK if that is some time in MM/DD/YYYY? Thanks, Person1
From Provider: Sure! MM/DD/YYYY is good!

From Patient: Hello Person1, Received a call yesterday concerning the pathology results for a nodule they removed on my vocal chords. It seems they are concerned it could be cancer. Appreciate if you would take a look at the results and let me have your opinion. I interpreting it as early stage throat cancer and presume we are looking at more surgery. They ordered a CT scan of the neck for MM/DD/YYYY and a ENT consultation on MM/DD/YYYY. Am assuming this is my new normal now and that we going to continue to find more of this as time goes by. Seems my immune system is not doing its job at stopping this stuff from occurring? Best regards, Person2

From Provider: Hi Person1 I asked Dr Person2 to review and here are his thoughts. 1) There is no Melanoma i n any of your lymph nodes that were biopsied. 2) He did review the vocal code pathology and from what he can see, there is no sign of any cancer present. Once MM/DD/YYYY e CT neck is completed, Dr Person2 can review that as well. Let me know if you have any other questions. Thanks! Person3
From Patient: Appreciated Person1.

From Patient: Hello Dr. Person1, Yes, I would like to see someone about having that possible surgery since it is very bothersome and affects both my reading and eyesight. Does this mean that the nerve was permanently damaged or that the nerve compression could still resolve itself? I was unaware that this was a possible risk of the neck surgery and have been hoping it would heal itself naturally over time. Is that still possible? Thanks, Person2

From Patient: Hello Person1, Sharing a picture of my abdomen some 40 days after starting on the heparin. In addition to the bruising, I probably have 20+ hematoma under the skin. This is both uncomfortable and painful. Would like to switch back to Eliquis. Thanks, Person2
From Provider: Hi Person1 report from MM/DD/YYYY faxed to Dr Person2 office Person6 Person3 RN

From Patient: Hello Person1. He recommended Zanubrutinib at this time. He had wanted to add me to a trial he running that he said would likely cure me but because of the lung cancer diagnosis I would have to wait two years. I will follow up with him. He was going to fax you and I gave him your fax number. Thanks, Person3

From Provider: Hello Person1, The fax number in Dr Person5's office is XXX-XXX-XXXX. I am covering in clinic today for Person2 and will be on the look out, should the fax come through. Thank you, Person3, RN
From Patient: Thanks. Did you receive the fax from Dr. Person1?

From Patient: Hello Person1, As you suspected, they have confirmed I have an adenocarcinoma with mucinous differentiation in the left lung. I was reading that IPI and NIVO are used to treat this and wondered whether that is something you would consider or would you still prefer that we do the surgery immediately? Am seeing Dr. Person2 on MM/DD/YYYY next week for a follow up so will discuss the surgical option with him then. Thanks, and a Happy New Year! Person3

From Patient: Good morning Person1, I am contacting you about the surgical drain Dr Person2 placed MM/DD/YYYY. I spoke with Person3 yesterday and she said to let you know today how it was going. It was just under 20 ml in the past 24 hour and 18 ml, the previous 24 hours. So I am hoping to come in today to have it out and also hoping to combine my 2 week post op visit with Dr Lynch at the same time. That appt is sched for Thurs. Hopefully we can work this out today.
From Patient: Hi Person1, I forgot to give you my cell number which would be the easiest way to contact me. It is XXX-XXX-XXXX THanks, Person2
From Provider: Hi Person1 Glad I saw you in person and clarify treatment. I was sorry to see you so sad. I will see you next week . Try to have a good evening. I'm in your corner. Person2
From Patient: Thanks Person1, I felt much better after seeing you and look forward to meeting with Dr Person2 on MM/DD/YYYY. Thanks again for your help and support. Person3
From Patient: Good Morning, I was in last week for biopsy and US, all good, thank God.......when do I have to come in next for a check up? Thanks, Person1
From Patient: Thank you, Person1
From Provider: We were able to move up the imaging let me know if there's any issue! Person1
From Provider: Good Morning The Zometa will be around every 6 months. Next one is scheduled for MM/DD/YYYY. Kind Regards
From Provider: Hi Person1, Yes reviewed with Dr Person2. The level came back low . You are correct with the plan to hold off on this cycle and have labs redrawn next week. Kind regards
From Patient: I am sick with a cold, possibly covid awaiting test results. Should I stop taking the ibrance while I sick? Thank you, Person1

From Provider: Hi Person1, If you are having fevers and feeling unwell you should hold the Ibrance. Especially if you are concerned about COVID. You can restart once the test is negative and you are feeling better. Please let us know if you are COVID positive. Thanks! Person2, MD

From Provider: Hi Person1, Let's check an estradiol level. I'll put in the order, whenever you get a chance to stop by the lab. We might just have to change the dose of the injection. Thanks for letting us know!

From Patient: Good morning, I finished the 2nd cycle of ibrance last MM/DD/YYYY. Will I still be taking the same dose, 100mg? Also will I be doing a CBC before I start the 3rd cycle? Thank you, Person1
From Provider: Hi Person1 The plan is to continue on the 100mg. Yes you would need labs before you start your next cycle. Order for labs are being placed. Kind Regards
From Provider: So sorry about that. I will enter one now.
From Provider: Yes, you could go to the 4th floor lab beforehand if you like for blood work. Or you could wait until the next week before restarting the next cycle.

From Patient: Good morning, I was just wondering, I started the verzenio on MM/DD/YYYY, will I be doing a CBC 2 weeks after the start ? Or I can wait till I come in MM/DD/YYYY for the zometa? Thank you, Person1 :-)

From Patient: Dr. Person1, there has been a throwup bug going through my family. Yesterday i was out in the sun most the day, and last night i got diarrhea and was throwing up. My whole body aches, and i believe i have a fever. Is this something i should be concerned about, or will it pass.
From Patient: All better, thank you
From Provider: Hi, the results get released to patients as soon as they are ready. I just checked and they are not ready yet. Best, Person1
From Patient: Urinating a little more often, urgency same No walking issues no pain ud and down. I will get labs first am
From Provider: Thank you we will watch for the lab results. Glad your feeling better. Person1 RN
From Patient: Can i change my MM/DD/YYYY appointment to the MM/DD/YYYY i will be away on the MM/DD/YYYY. I can make any time available those days?
From Provider: Hello Person1. The next available we were able to get in you is for MM/DD/YYYY at 130. All details is in your mychart. Thank you.

From Patient: Findings are in keeping with known osseous metastatic disease in both distal femurs. This is what was noted in the testing results. So it has traveled to my femurs and it also indicates that is is "with known osseous metastatic disease" Will this now qualify me for both femur and knee inclusion in the next CAT scan? Thank you for your time. Person1
From Patient: Vitamin dosage daily Calcium 1000 Mag 400 D-2500 Zinc 25
From Provider: Hi Person1 I will check with Person1 and Dr. Person2 and someone should reach out Best, Person3

From Patient: Hello Dr. Person1, Hope this finds you healthy and happy. Can you put an order on for Person2 to have his port flushed for the middle of MM/DD/YYYY in Org3 on a MM/DD/YYYY morning. We also need to schedule a CT scan IV Contrast for First week in MM/DD/YYYY also on a MM/DD/YYYY morning.
From Patient: When will I be getting my Covid vaccine and can my wife get it also Person2

From Patient: Hello I have a Ct Scan schedule for MM/DD/YYYY in Org2 and a follow up appt on MM/DD/YYYY in Org2 and I donot see any appt for a blood draw that I normally get before my appts Can u schedule something either on MM/DD/YYYY before my Ct Scan or MM/DD/YYYY before my follow up with Dr Person1.

From Patient: Hi Dr Person1, it Person3 Person2 wife. I am not sure if you know Person2 was in Org7 is extended care on MM/DD/YYYY and was seen by Dr. Person4. Well, we went home he didn feel good yesterday and today we had to rush him to Org7 where he was found to be septic. Why did Dr. Person4 not see this. As I text you he is now in Org6 emergency room and we all know how he is and they will not allow me to go in to be with him so I could hear and understand what is going ,because we know he does not hear well. Is there anyway I could be allowed to go in I had my Covid shots. Thank you, Person3
From Provider: Prednisone refill sent in
From Patient: Thank you
From Patient: Can you please take a look at PetScan for prostate cancer Thank you
From Patient: Yes I had prostate cancer and it had returned-3 years later
From Provider: Ok let me reach out to Dr Person1 and we will be in touch
From Patient: Person1 needs a refill on creon and I can request on my chart
From Provider: Hi yes will have APRN fill today after clinic. Thanks, Person1

From Provider: Hi Person1, Thanks for your message. We are closed on weekends and only check the MyChart MM/DD/YYYY-MM/DD/YYYY. I will pass along your question to Dr Person2, and looks like Person3 is in the hospital right now, so please also ask the Inpatient GI Team. I hope he is feeling better.
